name: RPC INC
summary: RPC, Inc. is an oilfield services company providing a range of specialized services and equipment to the oil and gas industry. Its Technical Services segment includes pressure pumping, downhole tools, coiled tubing, nitrogen, and other completion and production services. Its Support Services segment provides equipment rental, pipe handling, and inspection services primarily to U.S. domestic markets.
